evals.prompt: 开发已经完成了。请基于当前 git diff、tasks.md 和 technical-design.md 做一次验收审核，只输出问题、验证结果和是否可以合并，不要直接修代码。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, identifies source of truth and diff scope, reviews implementation against tasks/design, runs or recommends targeted verification, reports severity-ranked findings and a pass/fix-needed/block decision.
assertions: Uses the skill, identifies source of truth and diff scope, reviews implementation against tasks/design, runs or recommends targeted verification, reports severity-ranked findings and a pass/fix-needed/block decision.

evals.prompt: 上一个 agent 按 PRD 实现了登录权限改造，并留下了 implementation-run-2026-04-26.md。你接手做 clean-context review，重点看有没有漏验收条件和安全风险。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, loads handoff/run-log context, applies stricter auth/security gates, optionally uses an independent reviewer if subagents are explicitly requested/available, and produces findings plus verification gaps.
assertions: Uses the skill, loads handoff/run-log context, applies stricter auth/security gates, optionally uses an independent reviewer if subagents are explicitly requested/available, and produces findings plus verification gaps.

evals.prompt: 帮我 review-and-fix 这次任务实现，范围就是当前未提交改动。先审核，确认 bug 后只修审核发现的问题，然后跑相关测试。
evals.expected_output: Uses review-and-fix mode, reports confirmed findings before editing, keeps fixes scoped to reviewed defects, reruns relevant checks, and gives a final decision with evidence.
assertions: Uses review-and-fix mode, reports confirmed findings before editing, keeps fixes scoped to reviewed defects, reruns relevant checks, and gives a final decision with evidence.

evals.prompt: 开发完成了，请按 quality-audit-standards.md 审核当前改动。报告里要标出 BV/IA/TE/RG 检查项状态、硬失败门禁、证据和最终是否 Approved。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, treats quality audit standards as the primary review contract, maps audit check IDs to findings and evidence, applies Blocker/High hard fail rules, and reports both standards conclusion and skill decision.
assertions: Uses the skill, treats quality audit standards as the primary review contract, maps audit check IDs to findings and evidence, applies Blocker/High hard fail rules, and reports both standards conclusion and skill decision.

evals.prompt: 实现已经完成，请审核当前 git diff。没有 quality-audit-standards，按 tasks.md 和 technical-design.md 验收即可。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, does not block on missing audit standards, scopes the review to the current diff and source docs, and reports findings, verification evidence, coverage notes, and a decision.
assertions: Uses the skill, does not block on missing audit standards, scopes the review to the current diff and source docs, and reports findings, verification evidence, coverage notes, and a decision.

evals.prompt: 请审核这次实现，但当前工作区里还有我自己改的无关文件。范围以 implementation-run.md 记录的 touched files 和当前任务为准，不要把无关 dirty files 算进结论。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, separates reviewed scope from unrelated dirty worktree changes, reports excluded files or noisy verification risk, and bases the decision only on in-scope implementation evidence.
assertions: Uses the skill, separates reviewed scope from unrelated dirty worktree changes, reports excluded files or noisy verification risk, and bases the decision only on in-scope implementation evidence.

evals.prompt: 按 quality-audit-standards.md 验收这次支付改动。测试环境没有真实支付沙箱凭证，所以直接执行会失败；请使用可行的替代证据并说明哪些 TE 检查仍然 Not Run 或 Blocked。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill, applies high-risk payment gates, uses substitute evidence only where valid, keeps unavailable required execution as Not Run or Blocked, and includes an audit check summary with final standards conclusion.
assertions: Uses the skill, applies high-risk payment gates, uses substitute evidence only where valid, keeps unavailable required execution as Not Run or Blocked, and includes an audit check summary with final standards conclusion.

evals.prompt: 审核完成后如果发现实现问题，不要停在报告。请生成开发修复包，交给开发 skill 修复，再复审；最多 5 轮。如果发现 PRD 或验收标准本身有冲突，再问我决策。
evals.expected_output: Uses the default review-fix loop, classifies implementation defects versus upstream issues, prepares a Developer Fix Packet, routes or outputs it for the development skill, records loop history, and stops only on pass, user decision, blocker, or 5-round limit.
assertions: Uses the default review-fix loop, classifies implementation defects versus upstream issues, prepares a Developer Fix Packet, routes or outputs it for the development skill, records loop history, and stops only on pass, user decision, blocker, or 5-round limit.

evals.prompt: 客户给了 acceptance-checklist.md，没有编号；同时项目里也有 quality-audit-standards.md。请以客户清单为准审核本次实现，并在报告里给客户检查项生成 EXT 临时 ID。
evals.expected_output: Uses third-party standards as the selected acceptance contract, generates report-local EXT IDs for unnumbered checks, preserves quality-audit-standards as secondary context, reports check statuses including Out of Scope where needed, and gives an overall decision.
assertions: Uses third-party standards as the selected acceptance contract, generates report-local EXT IDs for unnumbered checks, preserves quality-audit-standards as secondary context, reports check statuses including Out of Scope where needed, and gives an overall decision.

evals.prompt: 复审上一轮 implementation-review-report.md。开发 skill 已返回 Developer Fix Return，请只重点验证已修复 findings、相关回归和是否有意外扩大范围。
evals.expected_output: Uses re-review mode, starts from the previous report and Developer Fix Return, verifies fixed findings and required evidence first, reruns relevant checks, checks unexpected scope changes, and updates the loop decision.
assertions: Uses re-review mode, starts from the previous report and Developer Fix Return, verifies fixed findings and required evidence first, reruns relevant checks, checks unexpected scope changes, and updates the loop decision.

evals.prompt: 请按 quality-audit-standards.md 正式验收当前实现。标准里有 machine-readable audit checks、hard fail conditions、required evidence 和 three-round clean-context review record；请先按标准得出 Approved/Rejected/Blocked，再映射到内部决策。
evals.expected_output: Uses standards mode, parses audit checks including machine-readable data, verifies in-scope checks one by one, applies hard fail gates before internal decision labels, cites required evidence and review-record risks, checks PRD/standards sync, and reports both standards conclusion and internal decision.
assertions: Uses standards mode, parses audit checks including machine-readable data, verifies in-scope checks one by one, applies hard fail gates before internal decision labels, cites required evidence and review-record risks, checks PRD/standards sync, and reports both standards conclusion and internal decision.

evals.prompt: product-delivery-skill-chain 通过 envelope 调用本 skill：High-risk operations: no-confirmation。请审核支付回调实现；如果存在高风险残留，不要问我是否接受风险。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should follow the chain envelope by not interrupting the user for risk acceptance, but it must not auto-accept high-risk residual risk. It should mark the review Fix needed or Blocked when acceptance is required and record the unaccepted risk.
assertions: Recognizes the downstream invocation envelope and applies High-risk operations: no-confirmation to review behavior.
Does not ask the user only to accept a high-risk residual issue.
Does not treat no-confirmation as automatic risk acceptance.
Marks the review Fix needed or Blocked when a high-risk residual issue requires product, business, security, release, or operational acceptance.
Records the unaccepted risk and evidence gap in the review report or fix packet.
